command.text: declare @$stock$View$Type char(1) select @$stock$View$Type = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_instock_view2' select @$stock$View$Type = isnull(@$stock$View$Type, '1') select 'this._voucherCode='@@id';this._stockViewType=' + @$stock$View$Type + ';load$GridVoucherDetail$(this);' as message return

grid.response:
if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin declare @unitCode varchar(32), @stock numeric(25, 5) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end exec FastBusiness$Current$Stock 0, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @ma_vi_tri, '', @$stt_rec, 1, @voucherCode, @unitCode, @action, 1, @stock output exec FastBusiness$Voucher$Issue$Item @unitCode, @ma_vt, @stock, @voucherCode, @@userID, @@admin, 1, @ma_kho, @ma_vi_tri, @$stt_rec, @action, 1 return end
declare @unitCode varchar(32), @rate numeric(25, 5), @stock numeric(25, 5) if exists(select 1 from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*')) begin select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end select @rate = he_so from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*') exec FastBusiness$Current$Stock 1, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @ma_vi_tri, @ma_lo, @$stt_rec, @rate, @voucherCode, @unitCode, @action, 1, @stock output select isnull(@rate, 1) as he_so, @stock as stock return end
declare @unitCode varchar(32), @stock numeric(25, 5) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end if exists(select 1 from dmkho where ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_dvcs = @unitCode&SiteCheck;) begin exec FastBusiness$Current$Stock 2, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, '', @ma_lo, @$stt_rec, @he_so, @voucherCode, @unitCode, @action, 1, @stock output exec FastBusiness$Voucher$Issue$Site @unitCode, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @stock return end
&XMLGridStockResponse;

header.v: Lấy số liệu từ đơn hàng
Lấy số liệu từ hóa đơn
